caption:
FREE Frosty & Fries at Wendy’s on April 7th

No purchase necessary - just show up between 2-5pm and you’ll get a free Frosty & Fries

#wendys #freefood #food #foodie

transcription.text: Wendy's is giving out free Frosties and Fries on April 7th. Just go to any Wendy's between 2 to 5 p.m. and you'll get a Frosty and Fries totally for free.
